creator: wbe@psr.com
text:
(In reply to heikki from comment #38)

Heikki: How old are those HP microservers?  Are they "ancient hardware"?

(In reply to Mark Millard from comment #40)

Mark: Is a copy of the source + FreeBSD patches for 2.0.0_4,3 still available?  Am I correct in interpreting your comment as saying that xf86-video-mga is still available upstream and that it's just a FreeBSD decision to stop supporting that driver?
